owner.name: CSNL Lab (Center for Computational Social Neuroscience, Korea University)

metadata.description: CSNL-internal Claude Code marketplace. Plugins here are research-tooling for the CSNL paper-recommendation harness and are intended for lab members only.

plugins.name: csnl-paper-archive-interview
plugins.description: Per-researcher interactive interview over the lab's classic-paper archive. Verifies the researcher's profile, walks a pre-computed top-N queue (recent ≤5y / mid 5–10y / classic >10y), records one MCQ choice per paper, runs a meta-review every 10 answers, and pushes everything to csnl_paper_rec.archive_*. Korean-only researcher-facing text; no send paths.
